164d14148309.plainText: Join Our Team Bratton Physical Therapy is always looking for talented, passionate professionals to join our team in Slidell, Louisiana. If you're committed to providing exceptional one-on-one patient care, we'd love to hear from you. Why Work at Bratton PT? One-on-One Care Model: Treat one patient at a time — no double-booking, no aides running your patients. Clinical Autonomy: Make clinical decisions based on your expertise, not productivity quotas. Collaborative Team: Work alongside experienced therapists who share knowledge and support each other. Great Location: Slidell, LA — a growing community on the Northshore with easy access to New Orleans. Open Positions We are currently accepting applications for: Licensed Physical Therapists (full-time and part-time) Physical Therapist Assistants Front Office / Patient Coordinator How to Apply Send your resume and a brief cover letter to our office. We'll reach out to qualified candidates to schedule an interview. Call to Inquire
164d14148309.originalHtml:
Join Our Team

Bratton Physical Therapy is always looking for talented, passionate professionals to join our team in Slidell, Louisiana. If you're committed to providing exceptional one-on-one patient care, we'd love to hear from you.

Why Work at Bratton PT?

  • One-on-One Care Model: Treat one patient at a time — no double-booking, no aides running your patients.
  • Clinical Autonomy: Make clinical decisions based on your expertise, not productivity quotas.
  • Collaborative Team: Work alongside experienced therapists who share knowledge and support each other.
  • Great Location: Slidell, LA — a growing community on the Northshore with easy access to New Orleans.

Open Positions

We are currently accepting applications for:

  • Licensed Physical Therapists (full-time and part-time)
  • Physical Therapist Assistants
  • Front Office / Patient Coordinator

How to Apply

Send your resume and a brief cover letter to our office. We'll reach out to qualified candidates to schedule an interview.

Call to Inquire

Join Our Team

Bratton Physical Therapy is always looking for talented, passionate professionals to join our team in Slidell, Louisiana. If you're committed to providing exceptional one-on-one patient care, we'd love to hear from you.

Why Work at Bratton PT?

  • One-on-One Care Model: Treat one patient at a time — no double-booking, no aides running your patients.
  • Clinical Autonomy: Make clinical decisions based on your expertise, not productivity quotas.
  • Collaborative Team: Work alongside experienced therapists who share knowledge and support each other.
  • Great Location: Slidell, LA — a growing community on the Northshore with easy access to New Orleans.

Open Positions

We are currently accepting applications for:

  • Licensed Physical Therapists (full-time and part-time)
  • Physical Therapist Assistants
  • Front Office / Patient Coordinator

How to Apply

Send your resume and a brief cover letter to our office. We'll reach out to qualified candidates to schedule an interview.

Call to Inquire
